title: CIICII Mens Hair Clippers and Trimmers Set, Professional Cordless Barber Clippers for Hair Cutting Kit (Electric Razor Shavers & Beard/Hair Trimmer Haircut Kit) Clippers for Men DIY Home Salon
features: 🔥Classic Clippers & Trimmers & Shavers Set: CIICII Professional Hair Clippers & T-Blade Trimmer & Electric Shavers are metal cover + premium plastic housing, adopt the vintage + modern fashion design and combined with ergonomic handle to make the clippers top-notch in both durability and comfort, And high carbon-steel cutting blades can stay sharper and longer. The large hair clipper for haircutting + the small hair trimmer for trimming sideburns and hairstyles + Electric Razor for shaving beard and bald to give you an exquisite grooming experience just like in a barbershop.

✨Adjustable Hair Clippers and Trimmers Kit: Adjustable taper lever offers the hair clippers precise hair cutting control (0.45-0.8 mm cutting length) for blending & fading and equiped with 8 metal guards (1.5/ 3/ 4.5/ 6/ 10/ 13/ 16/ 19mm) to meet your more haircutting styles. Besides, the zero gaped T blade trimmer can achieve 0.1mm close cutting for trimming, outlining & carving and also equiped with 3 trimmer guards (0.5 / 1/ 1.5mm) to meet your more hairstyles need. ☛More various sizes of hair cutting length let your hairdressing journey more spontaneous.

💡Quiet Heavy-Duty Motor & HD Digital Display: ❶High performance silver pd alloy powerful motor providing sufficient power (7000-6000-8800 RPM) while keeping operation low vibration, low hot and low noise (under 65dB), which can easily cut through thick, curly, soft hair and beard, reduce the possibility of plucking for a faster, smoother, quieter hair cutting. ❷LCD HD digital display clearly shows power, rotation speed, charge indicator & lubrication oil reminder to real-time monitor the hair cutting machine's power and status.

🔋Cordless Clippers & Trimmers & Shavers: ●2200mAh battery rechargeable hair clippers can cordless use over 3 hours after full charge. ●1400mAh hair trimmer can cordless use over 2 hours after full charge. ●1200mAh Electric Shavers can cordless use over 2 hours after full charge. USB Charging Cable can charge anytime anywhere by connecting with any type USB interface adapter (Like phone charging adapter, laptop, usb plug board, power bank...), Designed for international use, easy to use for business trip or travel.

⭐Multipurpose Professional Barber Kit: ●CIICII Professional Hair Clippers is designed for blending & fading head hair and synthetic wig. ●Close cutting T trimmer is perfect for outlining carving & shaping hair, large beard, sideburns and edges around the ears. ●Electric Shavers is suitale for shaving small beard / mustaches and face, body hair. Save money from weekly barber, because ciicii cordless hair cutting kit is suitable for the whole family to use. Haircut for men/ women/ kids/ children/ elderly/ junior hairdresser & beginners at Home Barber Salon.

🎁Complete Hair Cutting Gift for DIY Hairdressing: 1 × Hair Clipper, 1 × T-Blade Trimmer, 1 × Electric Shaver, 1 × Hair Cutter Comb, 1 × Hair Cutting Cape, 2 × Blade Covers, 8 × Metal Guards, 3 × Trimmer Guards, 3 × USB Charging Cable (▲Without Plug Adapter), 3 × Cleaning Brush, 1 × User Manual. One barber set for all your haircutting needs, Perfect for mastering various hairstyles, whether you're at home or salon. ❤️90-DAYS Unconditional Return + 24-Month Quality Promise + CIICII Professional Customer Team will handle your any issues and help you in 12 hours.
